\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Provides methods for various FEM-\/related operations. 

This class includes static methods for computing shape functions and their derivatives depending on finite element types. These methods are used within the Dispatcher mechanism available in \mbox{\hyperlink{namespaceArcane}{Arcane}} through the class \mbox{\hyperlink{classArcaneFemFunctions_1_1CellFEMDispatcher}{Cell\+FEMDispatcher}} (coming from PASSMO). 

Definition at line 2971 of file Arcane\+Fem\+Functions.\+h.
